MS.S: <CLASS NAME="CIM_ManagedSystemElement"><QUALIFIER NAME="Abstract" TYPE="boolean" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="Locale" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>1033</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="UUID" TYPE="string"><VALUE>{8502C517-5FBB-11D2-AAC1-006008C78BC7}</VALUE></QUALIFIER><PROPERTY NAME="Caption" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MaxLen" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>64</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="Description" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="InstallDate" TYPE="datetime"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>MIF.DMTF|ComponentID|001.5</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="Name" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="Status" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MaxLen" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>10</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="ValueMap" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>OK</VALUE><VALUE>Error</VALUE><VALUE>Degraded</VALUE><VALUE>Unknown</VALUE><VALUE>Pred Fail</VALUE><VALUE>Starting</VALUE><VALUE>Stopping</VALUE><VALUE>Service</VALUE><VALUE>Stressed</VALUE><VALUE>NonRecover</VALUE><VALUE>No Contact</VALUE><VALUE>Lost Comm</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY></CLASS>

<CLASS NAME="CIM_PhysicalElement" SUPERCLASS="CIM_ManagedSystemElement"><QUALIFIER NAME="Locale" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>1033</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="UUID" TYPE="string"><VALUE>{FAF76B61-798C-11D2-AAD1-006008C78BC7}</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="Abstract" TYPE="boolean" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><PROPERTY NAME="CreationClassName" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="CIM_Key" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="MaxLen" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>256</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="Manufacturer" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MaxLen" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>256</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="Model" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MaxLen" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>64</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="OtherIdentifyingInfo" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="PartNumber" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MaxLen" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>256</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="PoweredOn" TYPE="boolean"><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="SerialNumber" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MaxLen" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>64</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="SKU" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MaxLen" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>64</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="Tag" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="CIM_Key" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="MaxLen" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>256</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="Version" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MaxLen" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>64</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY></CLASS>

<CLASS NAME="CIM_PhysicalComponent" SUPERCLASS="CIM_PhysicalElement"><QUALIFIER NAME="Locale" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>1033</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="UUID" TYPE="string"><VALUE>{FAF76B78-798C-11D2-AAD1-006008C78BC7}</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="abstract" TYPE="boolean" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><PROPERTY NAME="HotSwappable" TYPE="boolean"><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="Removable" TYPE="boolean"><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="Replaceable" TYPE="boolean"><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY></CLASS>

<CLASS NAME="CIM_Chip" SUPERCLASS="CIM_PhysicalComponent"><QUALIFIER NAME="Locale" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>1033</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="UUID" TYPE="string"><VALUE>{FAF76B7A-798C-11D2-AAD1-006008C78BC7}</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="abstract" TYPE="boolean" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><PROPERTY NAME="FormFactor" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY></CLASS>

<CLASS NAME="CIM_PhysicalMemory" SUPERCLASS="CIM_Chip"><QUALIFIER NAME="Locale" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>1033</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="UUID" TYPE="string"><VALUE>{FAF76B7B-798C-11D2-AAD1-006008C78BC7}</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="abstract" TYPE="boolean" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><PROPERTY NAME="FormFactor" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>MIF.DMTF|Memory Device|002.6</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="Override" TYPE="string" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>FormFactor</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="BankLabel" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>MIF.DMTF|Memory Device|002.4</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="MaxLen" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>64</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="Capacity" TYPE="uint64"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>MIF.DMTF|Memory Device|002.5</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="DataWidth" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>MIF.DMTF|Memory Device|002.8</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="InterleavePosition" TYPE="uint32"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>MIF.DMTF|Memory Device Mapped Addresses|001.7</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="MemoryType" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>MIF.DMTF|Memory Device|002.9</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="PositionInRow" TYPE="uint32"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>MIF.DMTF|Memory Device Mapped Addresses|001.6</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="Speed" TYPE="uint32"><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="TotalWidth" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>MIF.DMTF|Memory Device|002.7</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY></CLASS>

<CLASS NAME="Win32_PhysicalMemory" SUPERCLASS="CIM_PhysicalMemory"><QUALIFIER NAME="Locale" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>1033</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="UUID" TYPE="string"><VALUE>{FAF76B93-798C-11D2-AAD1-006008C78BC7}</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="dynamic" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="provider" TYPE="string"><VALUE>CIMWin32</VALUE></QUALIFIER><PROPERTY NAME="Tag" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="CIM_Key" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="MaxLen" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>256</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="key" TYPE="boolean" OVERRIDABLE="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>WMI</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="Override" TYPE="string"><VALUE>Tag</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="Attributes" TYPE="uint32"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 17|Attributes</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="ConfiguredClockSpeed" TYPE="uint32"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 17|Configured Memory Clock Speed</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="ConfiguredVoltage" TYPE="uint32"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 17|Configured voltage</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="DeviceLocator" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 17|Device Locator</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="InterleaveDataDepth" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 20|Interleaved Data Depth</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="MaxVoltage" TYPE="uint32"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 17|Maximum voltage</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="MinVoltage" TYPE="uint32"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 20|Minimum voltage</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="SMBIOSMemoryType" TYPE="uint32"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 17|Memory_Type</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="TypeDetail" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 17|Type Detail</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY></CLASS>
